subtitle: A quiet river, a small band, and an empire’s shadow

panels.action: Bagha Jatin stands firm on the sandy bank of a quiet river, rifle resting against his shoulder, monsoon clouds massing over the flat Balasore countryside as distant silhouettes of armed pursuers emerge on the horizon.

dialogue.text: Bagha Jatin, storm-silent by the Buribalam, holds his ground as war and empire close in on a handful of men.

i18n.hi: बाघा जतिन, बुरीबलम के पास तूफान-सा चुप, कुछ साथियों के साथ जंग और साम्राज्य से भिड़ते खड़े हैं।

panels.action: A bird’s-eye view of Bengal and eastern India in 1915 shows rail lines, rivers, and small towns under a hazy colonial sky, with faint outlines of British cantonments and police outposts dotting the landscape.

dialogue.text: It is 1915. The Great War burns in Europe, and under the flat skies of Bengal, another war moves in shadows and whispers.

i18n.hi: साल 1915। यूरोप में महायुद्ध धधक रहा है, और बंगाल के सपाट आसमान तले एक और जंग फुसफुसाहटों में चल रही है।

panels.action: Inside a modest Bengali house, a younger Bagha Jatin leans over a table scattered with letters and maps, a simple lamp casting sharp light as his face shows quiet resolve.

dialogue.text: Jatindranath Mukherjee, called Bagha Jatin, has spent years weaving threads of revolt—uniting scattered circles, training men, planning beyond the fury of momentary violence.

i18n.hi: जतिंद्रनाथ मुखर्जी, यानी बाघा जतिन, बरसों से बगावत के धागे बुन रहे हैं—छिटके गुटों को जोड़ते, साथियों को साधते, तात्कालिक हिंसा से आगे की योजना रचते।

panels.action: Close on Bagha Jatin’s hands pinning small markers onto a map of eastern India, some at Calcutta, others along the coast near Balasore, as a faint outline of a steamship at sea is seen through a window.

dialogue.text: When war comes, his mind turns to opportunity: German arms by sea, a rising on land, and a blow that might shake the Raj.

i18n.hi: जंग छिड़ते ही दिमाग मौके पर टिक जाता है: समुंदर से जर्मन हथियार, धरती पर बगावत, और एक चोट जो राज को हिला दे।

panels.action: Bagha Jatin stands in a dim room with a few unseen comrades at the edge of frame, gesturing towards a rough coastal sketch showing Balasore and its creeks, his expression calm but intense.

dialogue.speaker: bagha_jatin_jatindranath_mukherjee
dialogue.text: We must be ready along the coast. Quietly, carefully.

i18n.hi: तट पर तैयार रहना होगा। चुपचाप, संभलकर।

panels.action: A steamship is hinted far off on a restless Bay of Bengal, while on shore a lonely stretch near Balasore lies under a fading sun; a small group of Indian men move discreetly through casuarina groves.

dialogue.text: Across continents, plans twist and tangle—the German-Indian conspiracy noted even by official eyes, as reports in Calcutta begin to speak of smuggled arms and seditious networks.

i18n.hi: महाद्वीपों के पार योजनाएँ उलझती जाती हैं—जर्मन–भारतीय साज़िश अब सरकारी नज़र में भी है, कलकत्ता की रिपोर्टें तस्करी के हथियार और गुप्त जाल की बातें करने लगी हैं।

panels.action: From behind thick undergrowth, Bagha Jatin peers towards the coastal plain near Balasore, a rifle slung discreetly, as distant figures of policemen and soldiers question villagers.

dialogue.text: The net tightens. Informers whisper, telegrams flash, and the Rowlatt records later trace how the state closed in upon these elusive conspirators.

i18n.hi: घेरा कस रहा है। मुखबिर फुसफुसा रहे हैं, तार दौड़ रहे हैं, और रॉलेट की फाइलें बाद में लिखेंगी कि राज्य ने इन पकड़ से बाहर साज़िशकारों को कैसे दबोचा।

panels.action: Close-up of Bagha Jatin’s weathered face as he listens intently to an unseen comrade; the light catches the lines at his eyes, his jaw setting in quiet decision.

dialogue.text: To the police, he is a dangerous organiser, a name in secret files. To his comrades, he is a quiet centre, asking not for glory but discipline.

i18n.hi: पुलिस के लिए वह खतरनाक आयोजक है, गुप्त फाइलों का एक नाम। साथियों के लिए शांत केन्द्र, जिसे शोहरत नहीं, अनुशासन चाहिए।

panels.action: Under a starless sky on the outskirts of Balasore, Bagha Jatin and a small band sit in a rough camp near a clump of trees, rifles beside them, a faint cooking fire dying down.

dialogue.text: In September 1915, near Balasore, his band lies low—few in number, with arms scarce, but still bound by a plan larger than their own lives.

i18n.hi: सितंबर 1915, बालासोर के पास, उसका दल दुबका हुआ है—संख्या कम, हथियार थोड़े, पर अपनी जान से बड़ी योजना से बंधा हुआ।

panels.action: At first light, Bagha Jatin stands beside a narrow riverbank lined with grasses—the Buribalam—surveying the opposite bank while a couple of unseen comrades move quietly behind him.

dialogue.text: By the river Buribalam, the land dips low and quiet. Here, geography offers a thin shield for hunted men.

i18n.hi: बुरीबलम के किनारे ज़मीन हल्की ढलान में, निस्तब्ध। भागते लोगों के लिए बस इतना-सा भूगोल ही ढाल है।

panels.action: Bagha Jatin turns his head sharply as faint dust clouds rise in the distance across the flat plain, hinting at an approaching column of police and soldiers.

dialogue.speaker: bagha_jatin_jatindranath_mukherjee
dialogue.text: They are coming. We choose our ground, not our fear.

i18n.hi: वे आ रहे हैं। ज़मीन हम चुनेंगे, डर नहीं।

panels.action: Crouched behind a small earthen embankment by the river, Bagha Jatin grips his rifle, his body angled protectively towards comrades just out of frame, reeds bending in the breeze.

dialogue.text: He knows the odds. The state brings trained men, ammunition, authority. He has a handful of fighters and a stubborn, deliberate will.

i18n.hi: वह सब समझता है। राज्य के पास तजुर्बेकार सिपाही, गोलियां, हुकूमत है। उसके पास चंद लड़ाके और ज़िद भरी सोची-समझी इच्छा।

panels.action: From across the Buribalam, a line of colonial police and soldiers spread out cautiously, rifles at the ready, as Bagha Jatin’s small group lies concealed along the near bank.

dialogue.text: Official reports will later note this encounter near Balasore—a brief, fierce clash where a few men stood against a much larger force.

i18n.hi: सरकारी रिकॉर्ड बाद में बालासोर के पास इस मुठभेड़ को दर्ज करेंगे—छोटी, भयंकर झड़प, जहाँ कुछ लोग बहुत बड़ी फोर्स से भिड़े।

panels.action: Close on Bagha Jatin’s hands and rifle as he takes careful aim from behind the embankment, his fingers steady, his eyes focused down the unseen line of fire.

dialogue.text: The air is thick with heat and dust. No heroic pose, only men firing, taking cover, moving on instinct and training drilled in secret courtyards.

i18n.hi: हवा में गरमी और धूल घुली है। कोई वीरता का पोज़ नहीं—बस लोग गोली चला रहे हैं, छिप रहे हैं, और गुप्त आँगनों में सीखी ट्रेनिंग से चल रहे हैं।

panels.action: Bagha Jatin, partially exposed, signals urgently with his arm toward the rear, indicating a path away from the riverbank while maintaining his position facing the enemy.

dialogue.text: Even under fire, his thought is not escape alone. It is: who can fall back, who must hold, how to keep the circle of trust unbroken.

i18n.hi: गोलियों की बौछार में भी दिमाग सिर्फ भागने पर नहीं है। सवाल है: कौन पीछे हटे, कौन डटे, भरोसे की घेरा कैसे टूटा न जाए।

panels.shot: medium shot with wounded posture implication
panels.action: Bagha Jatin braces himself against a small tree by the riverbank, his stance weakened yet upright, as allies further back glance toward him uncertainly.

dialogue.speaker: bagha_jatin_jatindranath_mukherjee
dialogue.text: Hold your courage. Think of the work yet to be done.

i18n.hi: हिम्मत थामे रखो। आगे के काम को याद रखो।

panels.action: Bagha Jatin kneels on the riverbank, resting for a moment, the reeds around him still; in the distance, colonial forces regroup and move cautiously forward.

dialogue.text: The fight cannot last. Ammunition runs low. Strength drains away. Between duty to survive and duty to shield his men, he finds no easy path.

i18n.hi: लड़ाई लंबी नहीं चलेगी। गोलियां घट रही हैं। ताकत चूक रही है। बचने का फ़र्ज़ और साथियों को ढाल बनने का फ़र्ज़—दोनों के बीच राह सीधी नहीं।

panels.action: Close on Bagha Jatin’s profile as he looks across the Buribalam one last time, the river reflecting a dull sky, his expression calm and unyielding.

dialogue.text: Later pages and memorials will embroider last words for him. The record itself is spare: a leader taken, a rebel subdued, the file marked and closed.

i18n.hi: बाद के पन्ने और स्मारक उसके लिए आखिरी शब्द गढ़ेंगे। असली रिकॉर्ड छोटा है: एक नेता गिरा, एक बागी कुचला गया, फाइल बंद हो गई।

panels.action: The riverbank lies quiet at dusk; faint footprints and scattered impressions mark where men once lay, while the Buribalam flows on, framed by empty fields and a distant village outlined against the fading light.

dialogue.text: Yet in the years that follow, Bagha Jatin’s stand by the Buribalam becomes a story retold—a sign that true bravery binds loyalty to comrades with responsibility to a larger, patient struggle.

i18n.hi: पर आने वाले सालों में, बुरीबलम पर बाघा जतिन की यह डटान फिर-फिर सुनाई जाती है—निशान कि सच्ची बहादुरी साथियों के प्रति निष्ठा को लम्बी, सब्र भरी जंग की ज़िम्मेदारी से जोड़ती है।

subtitle_i18n.en: A quiet river, a small band, and an empire’s shadow
subtitle_i18n.hi: शांत नदी, छोटा दल, और साम्राज्य की परछाईं
